title: PrismScoreOutput
description: Structured output schema for Prism Subagent B (scoring/rubric). Each dimension is 0-10.

structure.description: How well-structured the prompt is (XML tags, sections, clarity of intent)

specificity.description: How specific and measurable the goal is (vs vague adjectives)

security.description: Freedom from PII, injection phrases, and ambiguous authority statements

cache_friendliness.description: Length and stability of the static prefix (for prompt caching)

model_alignment.description: Alignment with target model's known behaviour profile and best practices

notes.description: Short explanatory notes for any dimension scored below 7

total.description: Sum of all five dimensions × 2 = Agentic Readiness Score out of 100
